agents.name: Venus-1
agents.note: A2 RULED arm(a)-compose; re-scope: mapping the owned date surface

agents.name: Mars-w1b
agents.note: DONE. Gates green: core typecheck 0, all-packages typecheck 0 (ui untouched), @/ grep empty. Reporting.

agents.name: Mars-w2
agents.note: Wave 2 DONE — 6 files on disk; fast gate green (typecheck 0, sb:typecheck 0, all greps clean); slow gate left to Director

agents.name: Apollo
agents.note: audit done: 5/5 land + cite x.md §5 LAW-1b (verified §5=aaw spawn protocol); reconcile-confirm CONFIRM (barrel 51, INV-6 no import, core hook real); writing retrospective

messages.body:
VENUS-1 — mx.7.3.1 (DateField) reconcile + brief. VERDICT: BUILD-GRADE, build-ready pending the A2 ruling.

RECONCILE (lag-1 vs as-built; NO-INVENT, all grounded):
- A bundle DateField.tsx — MATCH. 78 lines, {month,day,year} strings; props value/defaultValue/onChange/label/disabled EXACT to §3; SEGMENTS max 2/2/4 min 1/1/1 hi 12/31/9999 w 24/24/44; digit-slice + caret hand-off + bump-wrap; no @internationalized/date (only React); no accent. Note: bundle a11y has ONLY aria-valuenow — §4 rightly asks valuemin/valuemax; grounded as derive-from-SEGMENTS.min/.hi (added to brief).
- B core date layer — MATCH. NO useDateField/useCalendar (core's only hooks = useId + useArrowNavigation); machinery in internal/date-time/field/{segments,parts,helpers,time-helpers,types} + placeholders/utils/time-value; core barrel minimal (cx + date formatters, D-5); mercury-ui deps = ONLY @mercury/core. => arm (a) is genuinely a from-scratch hook build (confirms the Director's grounding).
- C Input cross-link — MATCH (inputs/Input/ exists, 4 files).
- D tokens — ALL PRESENT (--border-primary/-focus/--ring-focus/--font-secondary/-primary/--fg-primary/-tertiary/--bg-primary). CORRECTED: body §4 token list was INCOMPLETE (omitted --bg-primary box-bg, --fg-tertiary separator, --font-primary label) — completed it. NO fold needed, INV-10 clean.
- E barrel — MATCH. 50 export* baseline, no DateField, +1 => line #51 (export * from "./components/inputs/DateField"); additions.css has no .mx-datefield yet.
- DERIVED DRIFT (corrected): stories.md Coverage said K-8→S-5; body §5 says K-8→S-5,S-6. Body wins — synced stories Coverage + S-6 title to (K-8,K-9).

A2 FORK (the one open call — Operator rules; relay this):
Q: how does DateField get its value model + arithmetic?
- RATIONALE: the choice fixes the public value TYPE + where arithmetic lives; grounded: bundle native, core has machinery but NO ready hook (arm a = from-scratch).
- 5W: Why=forms need keyboard date entry; What=value model+arithmetic; Who=Mars builds, mx.9 showcase+consumers use; When=now, before mx.7.3.2; Where=ui home always (+core file if a; +ui dep edge if b).
- ARMS (grounded cost): (a) curated useDateField in @mercury/core atop the 1519-line machinery, ui consumes via core — HEAVIEST, i18n-correct, +core hook file +1 curated D-5 export; (b) @mercury/ui imports @internationalized/date directly — VIOLATES INV-6, only if explicitly ruled; (c) native {month,day,year} strings, translate the 78-line prototype 1:1 — LIGHTEST, epic-consistent, pure-presentational, no core edit, INV-6-free, i18n deferred (= no regression vs bundle).
- STEELMAN (a): the only i18n/locale/calendar-system-correct arm; if the Operator wants that investment now it is justifiably its own focus — which is exactly why this batch was split out.
- STEWARD (mine, not a decision): arm (c) for a faithful in-band batch-3 translation; reserve arm (a) for when i18n-correctness is wanted (own hardening rung). Operator rules.
- HARD INVARIANT EITHER WAY (INV-6): @mercury/ui must NOT import "@internationalized/date" directly.

BRIEF: arm-independent build (shape/a11y/.mx-datefield+full token list/barrel+1/contract/story) fully specced; value-model section split crisply by arm (a)/(c)/(b) — Mars builds exactly the ruled arm once you rule A2.

SPEC FILES EDITED:
- mx.7.3.1.md — §4 token list completed (+--bg-primary/--fg-tertiary/--font-primary; all present, no fold).
- mx.7.3.1.stories.md — Coverage K-8→S-5,S-6 + S-6 title (K-8,K-9), synced to body §5.
- mx.7.3.1.llms.md — recipe→arm-independent build steps (full token list + aria-valuemin/max grounding); +"The value model — build ONLY the ruled A2 arm" (a)/(c)/(b) split; early A2 flag linked to it.

Brief is build-ready pending the A2 ruling.

[A2 RULED — durable record] arm (a), REFRAMED as compose-Mercury's-reusable-foundation (formatters + internal/date-time via a curated useDateField composable, designed for DateField + Calendar reuse; D-5 one export; INV-6 intact). Full re-scope mandate delivered via SendMessage — reconcile + re-brief + record the ruling in the triad, then report to Director.

mx.7.3.1 WAVE 1 (@mercury/core) — DONE. Half 1 only; @mercury/ui untouched (wave 2). No git.

CHANGES
- NEW packages/mercury-core/src/internal/date-time/field/use-date-field.ts (useDateField composable).
- EDIT packages/mercury-core/src/index.ts (additive: +5 barrel lines; 3 existing export lines byte-untouched → master invariant holds by construction, no removals/renames).

SHIPPED SIGNATURE (wave 2 wires to this, verbatim):
export type UseDateFieldOptions = { value?: DateValue; defaultValue?: DateValue; onChange?: (v: DateValue | undefined) => void; locale?: string; granularity?: "day"; };
export interface UseDateFieldReturn { segments: DateSegment[]; fieldProps: FieldProps; segmentProps: (part: string) => SegmentProps; value: DateValue | undefined; }
Supporting exported types in the same module (reachable transitively via UseDateFieldReturn; NOT added to barrel per dispatch): DateSegment {part:string;value:string}; FieldProps {ref:RefObject<HTMLElement|null>;role:"group"}; EditableSegmentProps {"data-segment":string;role:"spinbutton";inputMode:"numeric";tabIndex:number;"aria-label":string;"aria-valuenow"?:number;"aria-valuemin":number;"aria-valuemax":number;onKeyDown:(e:KeyboardEvent<HTMLElement>)=>void}; LiteralSegmentProps {"data-segment":string}; SegmentProps = EditableSegmentProps | LiteralSegmentProps.
LOAD-BEARING for wave 2: spread fieldProps onto the container (carries fieldRef the machinery queries); for each item in segments, spread segmentProps(item.part) onto its element — segmentProps emits "data-segment":part on BOTH editable and literal (value reconstruction silently fails without it). Render editable parts (isDateSegmentPart true) as inputs, "literal" as separators.

BARREL ADDITIONS (verbatim, appended after `export * from "./date";`):
// Date-field composable + value kit (consumed by @mercury/ui DateField; ui keeps no @internationalized/date dep — INV-6).
export { useDateField } from "./internal/date-time/field/use-date-field";
export type { UseDateFieldOptions, UseDateFieldReturn } from "./internal/date-time/field/use-date-field";
export type { DateValue } from "@internationalized/date";
export { CalendarDate, parseDate } from "@internationalized/date";

internal/date-time COMPOSED (A2 arm a — compose, no native date math): helpers.ts {initializeSegmentValues, createContent, getValueFromSegments, areAllSegmentsFilled, isDateSegmentPart}; segments.ts {getSegments, getNextSegment, getPrevSegment}; utils.ts {getDaysInMonth}; formatter.ts {createFormatter}; @internationalized/date {CalendarDate, type DateValue}. New logic = only the keyboard reducer (digit-append w/ width+overflow+pad, ArrowUp/Down wrap, ArrowLeft/Right nav, Backspace) + a11y spinbutton props.

GATES (run from mercury/): `pnpm --filter @mercury/core typecheck` → 0. `pnpm --filter "./packages/*" typecheck` → all 4 Done (mercury-ui 0, unaffected). `/usr/bin/grep -rn "@/" use-date-field.ts` → exit 1 (empty=pass). No test/build gate requested for half 1 (core is source-consumed, no build script).

DEVIATIONS (realization-over-literal, none change the return shape):
1. Dropped `parseDate` from File-1 imports (unused in the hook) — still re-exported by the barrel direct from @internationalized/date per File 2. Avoids an unused import.
2. Added `DateSegmentPart` to the `./types.js` type import (dispatch named only SegmentValueObj) — required so segValues[part] / part==="month" typecheck under the union mapped type without a string index.
3. Seeded uncontrolled initial state from `defaultValue` when provided (dispatch State line showed only initializeSegmentValues("day"); the option is documented "uncontrolled initial value" → made it live). Additive only.
4. commit/resolvedValue gate on fieldRef.current truthiness: areAllSegmentsFilled(_, null) returns TRUE (empty used-segment list), which would fire a bogus neutral-date (2024-01-01) onChange pre-mount/SSR — null-node path now routes to onChange(undefined).
5. e.preventDefault() on digits + ArrowLeft/Right (dispatch required it only for Up/Down) — the hook fully owns the displayed value via createContent(segValues); native input/caret must not double-handle.
6. minValue/maxValue: deferred per dispatch — not added.

NO machinery gap blocked the build — every composed fn matched the stated call shape. Note for wave 2: displayed text comes from the machinery's createContentObj (formatter.part, numeric); stored values are zero-padded to width on completion/arrow-set, so completed 2-width parts render padded ("05") via the machinery's leadingZero path and aria-valuenow stays numeric (5). Verified by typecheck of index.ts re-exporting the new symbols (tsc errors on a missing re-export, so resolution is proven).

Mars-w2 (Wave 2 — @mercury/ui DateField) DONE. All 6 file changes on disk; FAST GATE GREEN.

FILES:
- NEW packages/mercury-ui/src/components/inputs/DateField/DateField.tsx — plain fn component (NOT forwardRef, per brief; bundle wraps in <label>, forwards no ref), consumes @mercury/core useDateField; spreads fieldProps on field span + segmentProps(seg.part) on every segment; literals = aria-hidden <span>, editable = readOnly <input> with non-color width inline (year 44 / else 24).
- NEW .../DateField/index.ts — export * from "./DateField".
- EDIT packages/mercury-ui/src/styles/additions.css — appended .mx-datefield block after the final .mx-scrollarea rule. radius = var(--radius-8). rgb(var(--token)) only.
- EDIT packages/mercury-ui/src/index.ts — +1 ADDITIVE barrel line: export * from "./components/inputs/DateField"; inserted after the Label export (line 49), before // selection. 0 removed/renamed; +DateField +DateFieldProps.
- NEW .../DateField/DateField.prompt.md — D-7 6-section contract (incl. all four required Notes: derived per-segment aria bounds, value model in core over internal/date-time, INV-6, controlled-vs-undefined).
- NEW .../DateField/DateField.stories.tsx — CSF3 title "Inputs/DateField": Playground / Uncontrolled (parseDate) / Controlled (useState<DateValue|undefined> + new CalendarDate(2024,3,15)). Date types from @mercury/core.

RADIUS TOKEN: --radius-8 (confirmed in tokens.css; matches mx.7.1). Also verified all 8 CSS tokens (--bg-primary,--border-primary,--border-focus,--ring-focus,--fg-primary,--fg-tertiary,--font-primary,--font-secondary) are defined — no invented token.

FAST GATE:
- pnpm --filter @mercury/ui typecheck → exit 0
- pnpm sb:typecheck → exit 0
- grep dynamic-inline-color → empty
- grep raw-hex (NEW + additions.css) → empty
- grep @internationalized/date IMPORT → empty (INV-6 holds). NOTE: the brief's broad grep #3 returns 2 PROSE hits — the INV-6 line in the .tsx docblock + the contract Notes that DESCRIBE the rule; a tightened import/require/from grep is empty.
- grep accent-inline → empty
- grep design-sync/showcase → empty

DEVIATIONS (2 minor realizations, both brief-faithful):
1. function component not forwardRef — per brief's explicit override of the house forwardRef default.
2. Composition cross-link to Calendar named as text "(planned mx.7.3.2)" with NO markdown link target (avoids a dead-link error in the specs checker); Input is a real resolvable link ../Input/Input.prompt.md.

NOT RUN (yours, the slow death window): pnpm --filter ./packages/* build, pnpm sb:build, pnpm --filter ./apps/* build. No git. Brief gaps: none.

mx.7.3.1 — Apollo standing-mentor pass (post-ship, PROPOSE-ONLY). Complete. No agent def edited; no commit.

## 1. Calibration audit — 5/5 CONFIRM (landed · coherent · cite x.md §5 LAW-1b · lean)
§5 anchor verified: LAW-1b (x.md:145) lives under "## 5. aaw spawn protocol" (x.md:104) — every back-citation is correct.

- x.md — LAW-1b block (145–150): CONFIRM. Canonical def; 3 disciplines (pre-ground / short-waves-write-first / recover-from-tree); explicitly "none relax LAW-1a"; cites mx.7.3.1. Full detail belongs here.
- mars.md — "Survive the spawn" (27–39): CONFIRM. 3 bullets, builder POV, ≤2–3 files, cites x.md §5 LAW-1b.
- venus.md — "Write-ready (effective messaging)" (98–105): CONFIRM. Brief = survival kit; carry signatures/paths/imports/usage; ≤2–3 files; cites.
- apollo.md — "Mentor on spawn-resilience too" (168–174): CONFIRM (1 optional nit, §2). Adds the 3rd mentoring axis (process); aims Venus=brief / Mars=write-first; cites.
- mercury-ship SKILL.md — standing-mentor elevation (131–137) + "Spawn resilience" binding (140–148): CONFIRM. Elevation = Apollo standing mentor every rung, PROPOSE-ONLY. Binding cites x.md §5 LAW-1b + the mx.7.2 two-waves precedent (core composable → ui home). Most verbose restatement, but justified as a context-binding skill; cites the canon, not a competing def.

Consistency: all four reference files cite the single canonical home (x.md §5 LAW-1b) — lean by design (one full definition + references). The ≤2–3-named-files cap, "files survive / report does not", and ECONNRESET are uniform across all five. No contradiction, no duplication, no bloat.

## 2. Proposed refinement (OPTIONAL, low-priority — Director ratifies)
Surface seam only: apollo.md:161 opens "craft + contract-fidelity ONLY — never on intent", while the new :168 bullet adds "spawn-resilience too … Beyond craft + contract". Substantively coherent (the "ONLY" excludes intent; spawn-resilience is process, not intent — the exclusion is preserved), but adjacent "ONLY"/"too" reads as micro-tension. Optional one-word fix that keeps the load-bearing "never on intent":

  - **Mentor on craft + contract-fidelity ONLY — never on intent; aim by peer, they fail differently.**
+ - **Mentor on craft + contract-fidelity — never on intent; aim by peer, they fail differently.**

(i.e. drop the single word "ONLY".) No-change is also acceptable — the bullets are non-contradictory; flagged only so the set reads as one system.

## 3. Reconcile-confirm (spot-check, 3 claims) — CONFIRM BUILD-GRADE
- Barrel +1: mercury-ui/src/index.ts = 51 `export * from "./components/…"` lines; DateField at index.ts:50. 50→51, 0 removed.
- INV-6: precise import grep over mercury-ui/src empty (the 2 textual hits = a .tsx comment + the .prompt.md contract, NOT imports).
- Core hook real: useDateField exported from @mercury/core barrel (index.ts:22); machinery imports real @internationalized/date fns (CalendarDate/DateValue in use-date-field.ts:3, DateFormatter in formatter.ts:1).

## 4. Retrospective — appended to docs/mercury/specs/mx.7.3.1/mx-7-3-1.progress.md
Went-well (write-ready dispatch survived the connection-death pattern; wave-split held core useDateField → ui DateField; clean foundation/consumer split) · Watch (subagent ECONNRESET infra fragility = standing tax, re-audit LAW-1b next rung; FAKE-N registry advisory = expected wave-split artifact, not a delegation violation) · Carry-forward (mx.7.3.2 Calendar reuses the foundation via sibling useCalendar; dispatch write-ready + wave-split per LAW-1b; INV-6 extends unchanged).
